methods.name: AddCustomUndoEvent(String, EventHandler<CustomUndoEventArgs>)
methods.signature: public bool AddCustomUndoEvent(string description, EventHandler<CustomUndoEventArgs> handler)

methods.name: AddCustomUndoEvent(String, EventHandler<CustomUndoEventArgs>, Object)
methods.signature: public bool AddCustomUndoEvent(string description, EventHandler<CustomUndoEventArgs> handler, Object tag)
methods.summary: Add a custom undo event so you can undo private plug-in data when the user performs an undo or redo

methods.name: AdjustModelUnitSystem
methods.signature: public void AdjustModelUnitSystem(UnitSystem newUnitSystem, bool scale)

methods.name: AdjustPageUnitSystem
methods.signature: public void AdjustPageUnitSystem(UnitSystem newUnitSystem, bool scale)

methods.name: BeginUndoRecord
methods.summary: Instructs Rhino to begin recording undo information when the document is changed outside of a command. We use this, e.g., to save changes caused by the modeless layer or object properties dialogs when commands are not running.

returns.doc: Serial number of record. Returns 0 if record is not started because undo information is already being recorded or undo is disabled.

methods.name: ClearUndoRecords(UInt32, Boolean)
methods.signature: public void ClearUndoRecords(uint undoSerialNumber, bool purgeDeletedObjects)

methods.name: Create
methods.summary: Creates a new RhinoDoc

params.name: modelTemplateFileName
params.doc: Name of a Rhino model to use as a template to initialize the document. If the template contains views, those views are created. If null, an empty document with no views is created

methods.name: CreateDefaultAttributes
methods.summary: Gets the default object attributes for this document. The attributes will be linked to the currently active layer and they will inherit the Document WireDensity setting.

methods.name: CreateHeadless
methods.summary: Create a new headless RhinoDoc from a template file

params.name: file3dmTemplatePath
params.doc: Name of a Rhino model to use as a template to initialize the document. If null, an empty document is created

returns.doc: New RhinoDoc on success. Note that this is a "headless" RhinoDoc and it's lifetime is under your control.

methods.name: Dispose
methods.summary: Releases all resources used by the RhinoDoc

methods.name: EndUndoRecord
methods.summary: Ends the undo record.

params.name: undoRecordSerialNumber
params.doc: The serial number of the undo record.

methods.name: Equals
methods.summary: (Overrides Object.Equals(Object).)

methods.name: Export
methods.summary: Export the entire document to a file. All file formats that Rhino can export to are supported by this function.

methods.name: ExportSelected
methods.summary: Export selected geometry to a file. All file formats that Rhino can export to are supported by this function.

methods.name: ExtractPreviewImage
methods.summary: Extracts the bitmap preview image from the specified model (3DM).

params.name: path
params.doc: The model (3DM) from which to extract the preview image. If null, the currently loaded model is used.

methods.name: Finalize
methods.summary: (Overrides Object.Finalize().)

methods.name: FindFile
methods.summary: Search for a file using Rhino's search path. Rhino will look in the following places: 1. Current model folder 2. Path specified in options dialog/File tab 3. Rhino system folders 4. Rhino executable folder

returns.doc: Path to existing file if found, an empty string if no file was found

methods.name: FromFilePath
methods.summary: Search the open document list for a document with a Path equal to the specified file path.

params.name: filePath
params.doc: The full path to the file to search for.

returns.doc: The file name to search for

methods.name: FromId
methods.signature: [ObsoleteAttribute("Use FromRuntimeSerialNumber")] public static RhinoDoc FromId(int docId)
methods.summary: Obsolete.

methods.name: GetAnalysisMeshingParameters
methods.summary: Get analysis meshing parameters currently used by the document

methods.name: GetCurrentMeshingParameters
methods.summary: Get the custom meshing parameters that this document will use.

methods.name: GetCustomUnitSystem
methods.signature: public bool GetCustomUnitSystem(bool modelUnits, out string customUnitName, out double metersPerCustomUnit)
methods.summary: Get the custom unit system name and custom unit scale.

params.name: modelUnits
params.doc: Set true to get values from the document's model unit system. Set false to get values from the document's page unit system.

params.name: metersPerCustomUnit
params.doc: The meters per custom unit scale.

methods.name: GetGumballPlane
methods.summary: Returns the active plane of Rhino's auto-gumball widget. Note, when calling from a Rhino command, make sure the command class has the Rhino.Commands.Style.Transparent command style attribute.

returns.doc: true if the auto-gumball widget is enabled and visible. False otherwise.

methods.name: GetHashCode
methods.summary: (Overrides Object.GetHashCode().)

methods.name: GetMeshingParameters
methods.summary: Get MeshingParameters currently used by the document

methods.name: GetRenderPrimitiveList
methods.signature: public RenderPrimitiveList GetRenderPrimitiveList(ViewportInfo viewport, DisplayPipelineAttributes attrs)
methods.summary: Build custom render mesh(es) for this document (i.e. - GH meshes).

params.name: attrs
params.doc: Attributes for the view mode you are supplying meshes for. Will be null if this is a modal rendering.

returns.doc: Returns a RenderPrimitiveList if successful otherwise returns null.

methods.name: GetRenderPrimitives(Boolean, Boolean)
methods.signature: public IEnumerable<RenderPrimitive> GetRenderPrimitives(bool forceTriangleMeshes, bool quietly)
methods.summary: Get a enumerable list of custom mesh primitives

params.name: forceTriangleMeshes
params.doc: If true all mesh faces will be triangulated

params.name: quietly
params.doc: Iterate quietly, if true then no user interface will be displayed

methods.name: GetRenderPrimitives(ViewportInfo, Boolean, Boolean)
methods.signature: public IEnumerable<RenderPrimitive> GetRenderPrimitives(ViewportInfo viewport, bool forceTriangleMeshes, bool quietly)
methods.summary: Get a enumerable list of custom mesh primitives

params.name: forceTriangleMeshes
params.doc: If true all mesh faces will be triangulated

params.name: quietly
params.doc: Iterate quietly, if true then no user interface will be displayed

methods.name: GetRenderPrimitives(Guid, ViewportInfo, Boolean, Boolean)
methods.signature: public IEnumerable<RenderPrimitive> GetRenderPrimitives(Guid plugInId, ViewportInfo viewport, bool forceTriangleMeshes, bool quietly)
methods.summary: Get a enumerable list of custom mesh primitives

params.name: plugInId
params.doc: The Id of the plug-in creating the iterator.

params.name: forceTriangleMeshes
params.doc: If true all mesh faces will be triangulated

params.name: quietly
params.doc: Iterate quietly, if true then no user interface will be displayed

methods.name: GetUnitSystemName
methods.signature: public string GetUnitSystemName(bool modelUnits, bool capitalize, bool singular, bool abbreviate)

methods.name: Import
methods.summary: Import geometry into a RhinoDoc from a file. This can be any file format that Rhino can import

methods.name: Open
methods.signature: public static RhinoDoc Open(string filePath, out bool wasAlreadyOpen)
methods.summary: Opens a 3dm file and makes it the active document. If called on windows the active document will be saved and closed and the new document will be opened and become the active document. If called on the Mac the file will be opened in a new document window.

params.name: filePath
params.doc: Full path to the 3dm file to open

params.name: wasAlreadyOpen
params.doc: Will get set to true if there is a currently open document with the specified path; otherwise it will get set to false.

returns.doc: Returns the newly opened document on success or null on error.

methods.name: OpenDocuments()
methods.summary: Returns a list of currently open Rhino documents

methods.name: OpenDocuments(Boolean)
methods.summary: Returns a list of currently open Rhino documents

params.name: includeHeadless
params.doc: pass true to include headless docs in the list

methods.name: OpenFile
methods.signature: [ObsoleteAttribute("OpenFile is obsolete, use Open instead")] public static bool OpenFile(string path)
methods.summary: Obsolete.

methods.name: OpenHeadless
methods.summary: Opens a 3DM file into a new headless RhinoDoc.

params.name: file3dmPath
params.doc: Path of a Rhino model to load.

methods.name: ReadFile
methods.signature: public static bool ReadFile(string path, FileReadOptions options)

methods.name: ReadFileVersion
methods.summary: Returns the file version of the current document. Use this function to determine which version of Rhino last saved the document.

returns.doc: The file version (e.g. 1, 2, 3, 4, etc.) or -1 if the document has not been read from disk.

methods.name: Redo
methods.summary: Redo the last action that was "undone"

methods.name: Save
methods.summary: Save doc to disk using the document's Path

methods.name: SaveAs(String)
methods.summary: Save doc as a 3dm to a specified path using the current Rhino file version

methods.name: SaveAs(String, Int32)
methods.signature: public bool SaveAs(string file3dmPath, int version)
methods.summary: Save doc as a 3dm to a specified path

methods.name: SaveAsTemplate(String)
methods.summary: Save this document as a template

methods.name: SaveAsTemplate(String, Int32)
methods.signature: public bool SaveAsTemplate(string file3dmTemplatePath, int version)
methods.summary: Save this document as a template to a specific Rhino file version

methods.name: SetCustomMeshingParameters
methods.summary: Set the custom meshing parameters that this document will use. You must also modify the MeshingParameterStyle property on the document to Custom if you want these meshing parameters to be used

methods.name: SetCustomUnitSystem
methods.signature: public bool SetCustomUnitSystem(bool modelUnits, string customUnitName, double metersPerCustomUnit, bool scale)
methods.summary: Changes the unit system to custom units and sets the custom unit scale.

params.name: modelUnits
params.doc: Set true to set values from the document's model unit system. Set false to set values from the document's page unit system.

params.name: metersPerCustomUnit
params.doc: The meters per custom unit scale.

params.name: scale
params.doc: Set true to scale existing objects.

methods.name: SupportsRenderPrimitiveList
methods.signature: public bool SupportsRenderPrimitiveList(ViewportInfo viewport, DisplayPipelineAttributes attrs)
methods.summary: Determines if custom render meshes will be built for this document (i.e. - GH meshes).

params.name: attrs
params.doc: Type of mesh to build. If attrs is non-null then a smaller mesh may be generated in less time, false is meant when actually rendering.

returns.doc: Returns true if custom render mesh(es) will get built for this document.

methods.name: TryGetRenderPrimitiveBoundingBox
methods.signature: public bool TryGetRenderPrimitiveBoundingBox(ViewportInfo viewport, DisplayPipelineAttributes attrs, out BoundingBox boundingBox)
methods.summary: Get the bounding box for the custom render meshes associated with this document (i.e. - GH meshes).

params.name: attrs
params.doc: Attributes for the view mode you are supplying meshes for. Will be null if this is a modal rendering.

params.name: boundingBox
params.doc: This will be set to BoundingBox.Unset on failure otherwise it will be the bounding box for the custom render meshes associated with this object.

returns.doc: Returns true if the bounding box was successfully calculated otherwise returns false on error.

methods.name: Undo
methods.summary: Undo the last action

methods.name: Write3dmFile
methods.signature: public bool Write3dmFile(string path, FileWriteOptions options)
methods.summary: Write information in this document to a .3dm file. Note, the active document's name will not be changed.

params.name: path
params.doc: The name of the .3dm file to write.

returns.doc: true if successful, false on failure.

methods.name: WriteFile
methods.signature: public bool WriteFile(string path, FileWriteOptions options)
methods.summary: Write information in this document to a file. Note, the active document's name will be changed to that of the path provided.
methods.remarks: This is the best choice for general file writing. It handles making backups using temporary files, locking and unlocking, loading file writing plug-ins, and many other details.

params.name: path
params.doc: The name of the file to write.

returns.doc: true if successful, false on failure.

properties.name: ActiveDoc
properties.summary: WARNING!! Do not use the ActiveDoc if you don't have to. Under Mac Rhino the ActiveDoc can change while a command is running. Use the doc that is passed to you in your RunCommand function or continue to use the same doc after the first call to ActiveDoc.

properties.name: Bitmaps
properties.summary: bitmaps used in textures, backgrounds, wallpapers, ...

properties.name: CurrentEnvironment
properties.summary: Access to the current environment for various uses

properties.name: CurrentUndoRecordSerialNumber
properties.summary: >0: undo recording is active and being saved on the undo record with the specified serial number. 0: undo recording is not active. (Disabled or nothing is being recorded.)

properties.name: DateLastEdited
properties.summary: Returns the date the document was created in Coordinated Universal Time (UTC). Use DateTime.ToLocalTime to convert to local time.

properties.name: Fonts
properties.summary: Obsolete.

properties.name: GroundPlane
properties.summary: Gets the ground plane of this document.

properties.name: IsCommandRunning
properties.summary: Returns true if Rhino is currently running a command.

properties.name: IsLocked
properties.summary: Check to see if the file associated with this document is locked. If it is locked then this is the only document that will be able to write the file. Other instances of Rhino will fail to write this document.

properties.name: IsReadOnly
properties.summary: Current read-only mode for this document. true if the document can be viewed but NOT saved. false if document can be viewed and saved.

properties.name: IsSendingMail
properties.summary: true if Rhino is in the process of sending this document as an email attachment.

properties.name: Layers
properties.summary: Layers in the document.

properties.name: LayoutSpaceAnnotationScalingEnabled
properties.summary: If LayoutSpaceAnnotationScaling is on, sizes in dimstyles are multiplied by dimscale when the annotation is displayed in a detail viewport not in a detail

properties.name: Linetypes
properties.summary: Linetypes in the document.

properties.name: Materials
properties.summary: Materials in the document.

properties.name: MeshingParameterStyle
properties.summary: Type of MeshingParameters currently used by the document to mesh objects

properties.name: ModelAbsoluteTolerance
properties.summary: Model space absolute tolerance.

properties.name: ModelAngleToleranceDegrees
properties.summary: Model space angle tolerance.

properties.name: ModelAngleToleranceRadians
properties.summary: Model space angle tolerance.

properties.name: ModelBasepoint
properties.summary: The base point in the model that is used when inserting the model into another as a block definition. By default the base point in any model is 0,0,0.

properties.name: ModelRelativeTolerance
properties.summary: Model space relative tolerance.

properties.name: ModelSpaceAnnotationScalingEnabled
properties.summary: If ModelSpaceAnnotationScaling is on, sizes in dimstyles are multiplied by dimscale when the annotation is displayed in a model space viewport not in a detail

properties.name: ModelSpaceHatchScale
properties.summary: The scale factor for hatches in model space when Hatch Scaling is enabled

properties.name: ModelSpaceHatchScalingEnabled
properties.summary: True if hatch scaling is enabled, false if not.

properties.name: ModelSpaceTextScale
properties.summary: The scale factor for text in model space when Annotation Scaling is enabled

properties.name: Modified
properties.summary: Returns or sets the document's modified flag.

properties.name: Name
properties.summary: Returns the name of the currently loaded Rhino document (3DM file).

properties.name: NamedConstructionPlanes
properties.summary: Collection of named construction planes.

properties.name: NamedLayerStates
properties.summary: Collection of named layer states.

properties.name: NamedPositions
properties.summary: Collection of named positions.

properties.name: NamedViews
properties.summary: Collection of named views.

properties.name: NextUndoRecordSerialNumber
properties.summary: The serial number that will be assigned to the next undo record that is constructed.

properties.name: Notes
properties.summary: Returns or sets the document's notes.

properties.name: PageAbsoluteTolerance
properties.summary: Page space absolute tolerance.

properties.name: PageAngleToleranceDegrees
properties.summary: Page space angle tolerance.

properties.name: PageAngleToleranceRadians
properties.summary: Page space angle tolerance.

properties.name: PageRelativeTolerance
properties.summary: Page space relative tolerance.

properties.name: Path
properties.summary: Returns the path of the currently loaded Rhino document (3DM file).

properties.name: PostEffects
properties.summary: Access to the post effects

properties.name: RedoActive
properties.summary: Returns true if Redo is currently active.

properties.name: RuntimeData
properties.summary: Collection of document runtime data. This is a good place to put non-serializable, per document data, such as panel view models. Note well: This data will be dispose with the document and does not get serialized.

properties.name: RuntimeSerialNumber
properties.summary: Unique serialNumber for the document while the application is running. This is not a persistent value.

properties.name: Snapshots
properties.summary: Collection of snapshots.

properties.name: Strings
properties.summary: Collection of document user data strings in this document

properties.name: SubDAppearance
properties.summary: Returns or sets the appearance of all SubD objects in the document.
properties.remarks: When setting this property, if the document contains SubD objects, then the document will be redrawn automatically.

properties.name: TemplateFileUsed
properties.summary: name of the template file used to create this document. This is a runtime value only present if the document was newly created.

properties.name: UndoActive
properties.summary: Returns true if Undo is currently active.

properties.name: UndoRecordingIsActive
properties.summary: true if undo recording is actually happening now.

properties.name: Worksession
properties.summary: Provides access to the document's worksession.

events.name: ActiveDocumentChanged
events.summary: This event is raised when the active document used by modeless user interface changes. On Mac Rhino this will get raised before the NewDocument, BeginOpenDocument and EndOpenDocument events. Mac Rhino will also raise this event with 0 for the document Id and a null document pointer when the last document is closed. Windows Rhino will raise this event after the NewDocument, BeginOpenDocument and EndOpenDocument events when a new or existing model is opened.

events.name: AddRhinoObject
events.summary: Called if a new object is added to the document.

events.name: BeforeTransformObjects
events.summary: Called before objects are being transformed

events.name: BeginOpenDocument
events.summary: This event is raised when the document open operation begins. NOTE: On Windows, this event will be fired when a clipboard paste operation occurs, as Rhino opens a .tmp file in the User's Local folder with the contents of the pasted document.

events.name: DeleteRhinoObject
events.summary: Called if an object is deleted. At some later point the object can be un-deleted.

events.name: DeselectAllObjects
events.summary: Called when all objects are deselected.

events.name: DeselectObjects
events.summary: Called when object(s) are deselected.

events.name: DimensionStyleTableEvent
events.summary: Called when any modification happens to a document's dimension style table.

events.name: EndOpenDocumentInitialViewUpdate
events.summary: This event is raised after EndOpenDocument when the documents initial views have been created and initialized.

events.name: GroupTableEvent
events.summary: Called when any modification happens to a document's group table.

events.name: InstanceDefinitionTableEvent
events.summary: Called when any modification happens to a document's instance definition table.

events.name: LayerTableEvent
events.summary: Called when any modification happens to a document's layer table.

events.name: LightTableEvent
events.summary: Called when any modification happens to a document's light table.

events.name: MaterialTableEvent
events.summary: Called when any modification happens to a document's material table.

events.name: ModifyObjectAttributes
events.summary: Called when all object attributes are changed.

events.name: PurgeRhinoObject
events.summary: Called if an object is being purged from a document. The object will cease to exist forever.

events.name: RenderTextureTableEvent
events.summary: Called when the RenderTextureTable has been loaded, is about to be cleared or has been cleared. See RhinoDoc.RenderContentTableEventType for more information.

events.name: ReplaceRhinoObject
events.summary: Called if an object is about to be replaced. If both RhinoDoc.UndoActive() and RhinoDoc.RedoActive() return false, then immediately after the ReplaceObject event, there will be a DeleteObject event followed by an AddObject event. If either RhinoDoc.UndoActive() or RhinoDoc::RedoActive() return true, then immediately after the ReplaceObject event, there will be a DeleteObject event followed by an UndeleteObject event.

events.name: SelectObjects
events.summary: Called when object(s) are selected.

events.name: TextureMappingEvent
events.summary: Called when any modification happens to a document objects texture mapping.

events.name: UndeleteRhinoObject
events.summary: Called if an object is un-deleted.

events.name: UserStringChanged
events.summary: This event is raised when document user text strings are changed
